V.rationale: Visa's best-in-class margins and steady growth, combined with positive strategic initiatives and constructive news flow, make it mildly attractive, though the absence of valuation comparables limits conviction.

BA.rationale: Boeing remains deeply unprofitable with negative equity and 55B in debt, yet the stock has already rallied 54% in a year — the recovery is priced in while the financial risk is not.
